autoSave.name: Auto-save to Journal
autoSave.hint: Automatically save encounter data to a JournalEntry when combat ends.

generateReadableJournal.name: Generate human-readable journal
generateReadableJournal.hint: Create a formatted Combat Log page in addition to the raw JSON page.

journalFolderName.name: Journal folder name
journalFolderName.hint: Name of the folder where encounter journals are stored.

rawDataCollection.name: Raw Data Collection
rawDataCollection.hint: When enabled, captures all raw PF2e hook data (chat messages, items, tokens) during combat for external analysis. Warning: produces large data files.

journal.saveError: Failed to save encounter to journal
